controls.title: Policies for information security
controls.description: Information security policy and topic-specific policies shall be defined, approved, published, communicated, and reviewed.

controls.title: Information security roles and responsibilities
controls.description: Information security roles and responsibilities shall be defined and allocated.

controls.title: Segregation of duties
controls.description: Conflicting duties and areas of responsibility shall be segregated.

controls.title: Threat intelligence
controls.description: Information relating to information security threats shall be collected and analysed.

controls.title: Information security in project management
controls.description: Information security shall be integrated into project management.

controls.title: Inventory of information and other associated assets
controls.description: An inventory of information and other associated assets shall be developed and maintained.

controls.title: Acceptable use of information and other associated assets
controls.description: Rules for acceptable use shall be identified, documented and implemented.

controls.title: Classification of information
controls.description: Information shall be classified according to information security needs.

controls.title: Labelling of information
controls.description: An appropriate set of procedures for labelling shall be developed and implemented.

controls.title: Information transfer
controls.description: Information transfer rules, procedures, or agreements shall be in place.

controls.title: Information security in supplier relationships
controls.description: Processes and procedures for managing information security risks associated with ICT supply chain.

controls.title: Information security for use of cloud services
controls.description: Processes for acquisition, use, management and exit from cloud services shall be established.

controls.title: Information security incident management planning and preparation
controls.description: Planning and preparation for managing information security incidents.

controls.title: Assessment and decision on information security events
controls.description: Events shall be assessed and decided whether to classify as incidents.

controls.title: Response to information security incidents
controls.description: Information security incidents shall be responded to in accordance with documented procedures.

controls.title: Collection of evidence
controls.description: Procedures for collection, acquisition, and preservation of evidence.

controls.title: Information security during disruption
controls.description: Plans for maintaining information security during disruption.

controls.title: ICT readiness for business continuity
controls.description: ICT readiness shall be planned, implemented, maintained and tested.

controls.title: Privacy and protection of PII
controls.description: Privacy and protection of PII shall be ensured as required.

controls.title: Compliance with policies, rules and standards
controls.description: Compliance with the organization's policies and standards shall be regularly reviewed.

controls.title: Screening
controls.description: Background verification checks on candidates shall be carried out.

controls.title: Information security awareness, education and training
controls.description: Personnel and relevant interested parties shall receive appropriate awareness, education and training.

controls.title: Physical security perimeters
controls.description: Security perimeters shall be defined and used to protect areas.

controls.title: Physical security monitoring
controls.description: Premises shall be continuously monitored for unauthorized physical access.

controls.title: User endpoint devices
controls.description: Information stored on, processed by or accessible via user endpoint devices shall be protected.

controls.title: Privileged access rights
controls.description: The allocation and use of privileged access rights shall be restricted and managed.

controls.title: Information access restriction
controls.description: Access to information and other associated assets shall be restricted.

controls.title: Access to source code
controls.description: Read and write access to source code, development tools and software libraries shall be managed.

controls.title: Secure authentication
controls.description: Secure authentication technologies and procedures shall be established.

controls.title: Protection against malware
controls.description: Protection against malware shall be implemented.

controls.title: Management of technical vulnerabilities
controls.description: Information about technical vulnerabilities shall be obtained and appropriate measures taken.

controls.title: Configuration management
controls.description: Configurations, including security configurations, shall be established, documented, implemented, monitored and reviewed.

controls.title: Data masking
controls.description: Data masking shall be used in accordance with the organization's topic-specific policy.

controls.title: Data leakage prevention
controls.description: Data leakage prevention measures shall be applied to systems, networks and other devices.

controls.title: Logging
controls.description: Logs that record activities, exceptions, faults and other relevant events shall be produced, stored, protected and analysed.

controls.title: Monitoring activities
controls.description: Networks, systems and applications shall be monitored for anomalous behaviour.

controls.title: Networks security
controls.description: Networks and network devices shall be secured, managed and controlled.

controls.title: Web filtering
controls.description: Access to external websites shall be managed to reduce exposure to malicious content.

controls.title: Use of cryptography
controls.description: Rules for effective use of cryptography shall be defined and implemented.

controls.title: Secure development life cycle
controls.description: Rules for the secure development of software and systems shall be established.

controls.title: Secure coding
controls.description: Secure coding principles shall be applied to software development.

controls.title: Security testing
controls.description: Adversarial testing programme covering goal hijack � direct, indirect, multi-turn injection before each release; Sandbox escape and code injection scenarios in security testing � adversarial testing before each deployment; Adversarial testing of model outputs for poisoning indicators before deployment

controls.title: Identity management
controls.description: Agent tool access governed through identity management � tool permissions scoped per agent identity; LLM tool access governed through identity management � tool permissions scoped per deployment

controls.title: Identity management
controls.description: NHI lifecycle management � all agent identities inventoried, provisioned, reviewed, and deprovisioned through formal process; All agent identities inventoried and lifecycle-managed as non-human identities

controls.title: Supplier agreements
controls.description: Contractual security requirements for all agent component suppliers � integrity guarantees, vulnerability notification SLA; Contractual requirements covering data minimisation, retention, and training use for tool providers; Contractual data handling requirements for labelling vendors and HITL service providers

controls.title: Supply chain security
controls.description: Managing ICT supply chain risks � agent tool and MCP server ecosystem explicitly in scope; Managing ICT supply chain risks � LLM model and library supply chain explicitly in scope

controls.title: Application security requirements
controls.description: Security requirements for agent code execution capability specified before development � sandbox spec, permitted operations; Input validation requirements specified for all GenAI data ingestion interfaces; Security requirements for LLM-to-SQL interfaces � read-only by default, parameterisation mandatory

controls.title: Backup
controls.description: Agent state and configuration backed up � recovery to known-good state after cascade incident; Backup and recovery for all AI data assets � vector stores, embedding indexes, RAG corpora; Backup and recovery for LLM service infrastructure � failover capability tested

controls.title: Authentication information
controls.description: Secure management of agent credentials � no hardcoding, rotation enforced

controls.title: Secure system architecture
controls.description: Training pipeline designed with integrity controls and supply chain verification; RAG pipeline designed with source trust verification and integrity controls; Training pipeline designed with integrity controls � data validation, source allowlisting, lineage tracking

controls.title: Information deletion
controls.description: Deletion and erasure obligations enforced across all derived assets � embeddings, caches, backups

controls.title: Compliance with legal requirements
controls.description: Identifying and complying with all legal, regulatory, and contractual requirements applicable to GenAI

controls.title: Test information
controls.description: Appropriate protection of test and synthetic data used in AI development

controls.title: Redundancy
controls.description: Redundancy and failover for production RAG and vector store infrastructure

changelog.change: Initial seed — 41 Annex A controls most relevant to GenAI security
changelog.author: emmanuelgjr
